positive: A minimalist, abstract portrait of a majestic mountain landscape rendered in a highly stylized, geometric linework style. Focus on strong contrasts between deep indigo blues, earthy terracotta reds, and crisp white highlights. The composition must be centrally focused, featuring clean, interlocking peaks and stylized foreground elements like geometric pine trees and stylized flowing rivers. The style should emulate negative space art, suitable for a bold, single-color screen print on apparel, providing a crisp, graphic silhouette. Use strong directional lighting to emphasize sharp edges and clean lines. High detail, flat illustration aesthetic, vector art quality, perfect for textile printing.
